subject: Gaming
title: Hot Coffee: Rockstar's Hidden Content
description: A quick win: understand Hot Coffee: Rockstar's Hidden Content.

hook.text: A hidden sex scene in GTA: San Andreas caused a national scandal. Rockstar said it was cut. Modders found it.

buildup.text: In 2005, modders discovered disabled sexual content still on the disc. The 'Hot Coffee' mod unlocked it.

discovery.text: The ESRB changed the game's rating from M to AO. Major retailers pulled it from shelves immediately.

twist.text: Rockstar claimed hackers created the content. Investigation proved it was original developer content, not a mod.

climax.text: The scandal cost Take-Two $20 million in settlements and reshaped how ratings boards audit game content.

punchline.text: Hidden content found on disc. A twenty-million-dollar cover-up unraveled.

quiz.question: What was the Hot Coffee scandal?
options: Modders discovered hidden sexual content on the GTA: San Andreas disc
A coffee company sued Rockstar for trademark violation
A game character burned themselves with coffee
